ko: 냉장고를 찾자. 먼저 화장실에서 주방 열쇠를 찾자.
en: Find the refrigerator. First find the kitchen key in the bathroom.
Go to the kitchen and inspect the refrigerator.
Find the generator wire in the basement storage room.
Connect the wire to the generator.
Use the shortcut to find plywood in Room 1.
Find the hammer in the hallway drawer.
Repair the refrigerator back wall with plywood and a hammer.
Find the coolant capsule in the hidden room on the second floor.
Repair the freezer with the coolant capsule.
Do not melt until the end. Enter the freezer.
